metadata.name: WordPress Core Execution Tests - Post Meta
metadata.description: Code generation tasks for WordPress post meta operations

tests.prompt: Write a function called 'save_view_count' that takes a post ID and increments a post meta value '_view_count' by 1. If the meta doesn't exist, initialize it to 1. The function should return the new view count.
tests.expected_behavior: Calling save_view_count(123) increments _view_count meta for post 123 and returns the new count
requirements: If meta doesn't exist, treat as 0
Increment by 1 and save using update_post_meta()
Return the new count as an integer

required_patterns.description: Must use get_post_meta to read current value
Must use update_post_meta to save value

forbidden_patterns.description: Should use WordPress meta functions, not direct queries
